privileged_info_summary: The required screenshot path is strictly /home/ga/visitor_agreement_configured.png. The visitor agreement text must contain the phrases 'confidential information', 'Morrison & Associates', and 'security screening'. Modifications to the Windows application configuration are stored within the /home/ga/.wine/drive_c directory.
